recommended.song_name: I Just Wanted You To Know

content:
Artist : Cher
Song : Just Like Jesse James
Key : Fm 
Bpm : 70
Capo : I
| = Measures 


Intro : 

 
[ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  | [ch]C[/ch]   | [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  | [ch]C[/ch]


Verse :  


[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                              [ch]D[/ch]                |
You're struttin' into town like you're slingin' a gun,[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]                          |
Just a small-town dude with big city attitude.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]                       | [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]       |
Honey are you lookin' for some trouble tonight - well alright.[/tab]

[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]D[/ch]                    |
You think you're so bad drive the women folk wild,[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                           [ch]D[/ch]                          |                   
shoot 'em all down with the flash of your pearly smile.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]                   | [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]     |
Honey but you met your match tonight,  oh that's right.[/tab]


Prechorus : 


[tab]                 [ch]Em[/ch]                            [ch]G[/ch]                 |
You think you'll knock me off my feet 'til I'm flat on the floor,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]                            [ch]C[/ch]                          |
'Til my heart is cryin' Indian and I'm beggin' for more.[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]D[/ch]                              |
So come on baby, come on baby,[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                              [ch]D[/ch]                 |
Come on baby show me what that loaded gun is for.[/tab]


Chorus :


[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]                    | [ch]C[/ch]                                [ch]D[/ch]                     |
If you can give it, I can take it, cause if this heart is gonna break, it's gonna take a lot to break it,[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]  | [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]                   |             [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]                  |
I know tonight, somebody's gonna win the fight. So if you're so tough, come on and prove it,[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Em[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]                             |
your heart is down for the count and you know you're gonna lose it,[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]        | [ch]C[/ch]                          |[ch]G[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]  | [ch]C[/ch]    | 
Tonight you're gonna go down in flames - just like Jesse James.[/tab]



Verse 2 :

 
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]                   |
You're an outlaw lover and I'm after you hide[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]               |           [ch]G[/ch]
Well you ain't so strong Won't be long 'til your hands are tied.[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]D[/ch]                  |  [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]       |
Tonight I'm gonna take you in dead or alive, that's right[/tab]


[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]D[/ch]               |
You break the laws of love in the name of desire[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]                                      [ch]D[/ch]      |  [ch]G[/ch]      
Take ten steps back 'cause I'm ready baby - aim and fire[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]D[/ch]                    | [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]         |
Baby there's nowhere you gonna run tonight - ooh that's right[/tab]


Prechorus : 


[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]                                  [ch]G[/ch]               |
Well you had your way with love but it's the end of the day[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]                          [ch]C[/ch]                          |
Now a team of wild horses couldn't drag your heart away[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]D[/ch]                          |                  
So come on baby, come on baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                 [ch]D[/ch]                      |
Come on baby you know there ain't nothing left to say.[/tab]


Chorus 2 : 


[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]                    | [ch]C[/ch]                                [ch]D[/ch]                     |
If you can give it, I can take it, cause if this heart is gonna break, it's gonna take a lot to break it,[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]  | [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]                   |             [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]                  |
I know tonight, somebody's gonna win the fight. So if you're so tough, come on and prove it,[/tab]

your heart is down for the count and you know you're gonna lose it,[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]        | [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]                   
Tonight you're gonna go down in flames - just like Jesse James.[/tab]
